title: Snow Under Trees (Datapack)
description: Adds snow under trees in snowy biomes as a Datapack
body:
Adds snow under trees in snowy biomes. While all other Snow-Under-Trees are mods, this is a datapack. 
The datapack is compatible with Tectonic. Worldgen mods/datapacks that modify biomes are not supported.
From my testing there's no measureable performance impact.

If you want more improvements to Snowy Biomes check out [Snowy Biomes: Enhanced](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-snowy-biome)

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f7ddb3a38ef1c53225036ab3750ce059ce10a98.jpeg)
